title: Sierra Passage
writer: Warren Douglas, Samuel Roeca, Thomas W. Blackburn
actors: Wayne Morris, Lola Albright, Lloyd Corrigan
plot: When Yance Carter, Andy and Bart, professional killers, murder his father, 13-year-old Johnny Yorke is adopted by Thad Kring, owner of a traveling minstrel show, featuring Sam Cooper as his ace sharpshooter. For the next ten years...
